description: This file provides a migration script for creating the 'roles' table in a MySQL database, used in a specific phase of the 'Career Navigator' backend project. It exports a function that returns the SQL commands for setting up this table, which supports features such as role ID, title, industry, core skills, seniority levels, and salary range, mainly used for recommendations based on personas.

methods.name: getMigrationSql()
methods.description: Returns SQL statements for creating the roles catalog table in MySQL.
